steps.title: Follow the concern-to-findings shift
steps.content: The passage first says pteropod shells are thought vulnerable to ocean acidification. It then reports findings that the periostracum prevents dissolution and that pteropods can rebuild the inner shell wall after damage.

steps.title: Match the main purpose
steps.content: Choice A calls for research the text does not request, Choice B concerns behavior over time, and Choice C reverses the protection relationship by saying calcium carbonate protects the periostracum. The purpose is to show the concern may be overstated. The answer is D.
